notes: THE WHEEL OF FORTUNE visitors. SCAFFOLD — three visitors with the canonical waiter sequence; per-visitor step flavor is placeholder.

visitors.name: The Pit Boss
visitors.lore_text: You see The Pit Boss. (THE WHEEL OF FORTUNE beat — refine.)
pre_arrival_hints: You sense the pit boss is near.
Steps. Or breath. Or the room shifting.

steps.greet: You meet eyes with The Pit Boss. The room registers it.
steps.listen: The Pit Boss tells you what they came to tell you.
steps.deliver: You give The Pit Boss what they were after.
steps.sit_with: The Pit Boss stays for a beat. You stay back.
